issue: Difficulty: ❌ TRIVIAL - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-express-trivia-worker for the Python HARD gate by adding Appendix H-2026-08 deferred dependency snapshot semantics, replacing INC-10 with an INC-13 amend-omit-correct_delta chain plus a post-record INC-5 rescind, rewriting the broken worker to be subtly wrong on those two interactions, adding matching tests and doc/instruction/rubric updates, fixing a ruff unused-import static-check failure, and bumping environment/Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r12.
